homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (very poor) to 7 (excellent).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 0
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION
solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: How correct is the information in the caption with relation to the audio? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, incorrect information) to 7 (best, accurate information)
prompts.1: How complete is the caption with relation to the audio. Consider mood, genre, and instrumentation descriptions. Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, does not contain information) to 7 (best, contains all relevant musical information)

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION
This alternative rock track features a male vocalist singing over a steady, medium-tempo rhythm driven by electric guitar and bass. A catchy guitar riff adds a groovy energy to the piece, creating an atmosphere well-suited for a live concert setting.

questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION
This segment serves as a lively and engaging example of traditional Spanish music, driven by an infectious rhythm that captures the essence of the genre. The sound is defined by the interplay of acoustic guitars and authentic percussive elements like castanets and a guiro, creating an energetic atmosphere perfect for dancing or storytelling.

questions.description:

CAPTION

Brass instruments like trumpets and saxophones weave through the complex harmonies, creating a lively and energetic atmosphere perfect for a city soundtrack. The track captures a sophisticated yet funky vibe suitable for a high-end restaurant or a retro-themed setting.

questions.description:

CAPTION
This instrumental meditation track features a solo flute playing a slow, gentle melody that creates a serene and calming atmosphere. The steady rhythm supports a simple yet effective motif, making the piece ideal for relaxation or background music during yoga sessions. Overall, the music evokes an introspective mood perfect for unwinding after a long day.
